sentence: 他不喜欢社交，周末宁愿待在家里。
pinyin: Tā bù xǐhuān shèjiāo, zhōumò nìngyuàn dāi zài jiālǐ.
english: He doesn't like socializing and would rather stay home on weekends.

sentence: 这套公寓是一位知名设计师设计的。
pinyin: Zhè tào gōngyù shì yī wèi zhīmíng shè jì shī shèjì de.
english: This apartment was designed by a well-known designer.
The general election results will be announced tomorrow.

sentence: 近年来，网购越来越受到大家的欢迎。
pinyin: Jìn nián lái, wǎng gòu yuè lái yuè shòu dào dà jiā de huān yíng.
english: Online shopping has become increasingly popular in recent years.

meaning: 1. optimization; 2. to optimize; 3. to make superior
sentence: 我们需要优化一下这个App的界面。
pinyin: Wǒmen xūyào yōu huà yīxià zhège App de jièmiàn.
english: We need to optimize the interface of this app a bit.
